ItacAcademyItem.Name: Marittimi (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Lion in the sea, near the land, with one foot touching the bottom
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The impresa is mentioned by Ferro, Teatro d`imprese (1623).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
